note: Second pass requested simpler Tiny Swords-style sprite. PixelLab generate-8-rotations-v2 caps image_size at 168, then frames were nearest-neighbor upscaled to 192 cells.
tiny_scale_note: Cropped each generated frame and nearest-neighbor scaled the visible sprite to max 72px, centered in 192x192 cells to better match the provided Tiny Swords reference footprint.
